name: Aegis of the Immortal
description: The Immortal was said to own a shield that protected him from death itself.

abilities.name: Reincarnation
abilities.description: Brings its wielder to life at its death location with full health and mana after its effect delay. Max Health Restore on Death: 100%. Max Mana Restore on Death: 100%. Ground Vision Bonus: 1800. Ground Vision Bonus: 800. Aegis Duration: 300. Turbo Aegis Duration: 240.
